name: shopfast
description: ShopFast — Full-stack app. Ecommerce API (port 8000) + LLM Chatbot API (port 8001) + React/Vite frontend (port 5173). Run 'npm run dev' to start everything.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ecommerce,chatbot,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:chatbot" "npm run dev:web"
